# Vipul Kaushik — Full-Stack Mobile Developer

> Full-stack mobile developer with 8+ years of experience building secure, scalable apps for SaaS, Fintech, and HealthTech. CTO at Rolling Around. Expert in React Native, Expo, Node.js, Redux, GraphQL, MongoDB, Firebase, and Supabase.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/): Portfolio homepage

- [Work](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/work): Portfolio of shipped apps
- [Blog](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/blogs): Technical articles on React Native
- [Contact](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/contact): Hire Vipul for your project
- [Testimonials](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/testimonials): Client reviews

## Free Developer Tools

- [HEIC to JPG Converter](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/tools/heic-to-jpg): Free online HEIC to JPG converter — convert Apple HEIC/HEIF photos to JPEG instantly in your browser, no upload required, fully client-side.
- [Image Compressor](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/tools/image-compressor): Free online image compressor — reduce PNG, JPEG, and WebP file sizes with adjustable quality, bulk compression, and instant browser-based processing.
- [JSON Formatter](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/tools/json-formatter): Free online JSON formatter and validator — beautify, minify, and validate JSON data instantly with syntax highlighting and error detection.
- [PDF Merger](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/tools/merge-pdf): Free online PDF merger — combine multiple PDF files into one document instantly in your browser, no upload to server, fully client-side processing.
- [Word Counter](https://www.vipulkaushik.com/tools/word-counter): Free online word counter — count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs with reading time estimates for writers, bloggers, and SEO professionals.
